pokemon:pecharunt.name: Pecharunt
pokemon:pecharunt.summary: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.

form:pecharunt.name: Pecharunt
form:pecharunt.summary: Pecharunt form with Poison / Ghost typing.
